offer.deliveryOther: audits, documentation workflows, and advisory support

step2.customerArchetype: Operations directors and plant managers who carry liability if the binder isn’t right
step2.painPoints: Inconsistent record-keeping across sites; last-minute consultant fire drills before inspections
step2.desiredOutcomes: A calm, defensible paper trail and a partner who speaks regulator and shop floor

step4.missionStatement: Reduce regulatory surprise so leadership can focus on production and people.

step5.originSummary: Fifteen years between agency inspections and internal quality roles before going independent.
step5.motivation: Saw too many good operators punished for bad documentation, not bad intent.

step7.differentiation: Solo-led engagement: same senior person on every call, templates tuned to your actual lines, not a binder from another industry.
